description: Malaysian OSAT subsidiary of Tianshui Huatian Technology (CMP-0068). Advanced IC packaging (wafer bump, RDL, flip chip, WLCSP), leadframe IC packages, test services (wafer probe and final testing on RF, analog, digital, mixed-signal platforms), turnkey services. Key customers: Qorvo, Skyworks, Broadcom, Elmos, Allegro, Microchip, Renesas. Market cap ~5.0B MYR.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - wafer probing and dicing equipment
_externalRelationships.notes: Bursa Malaysia listed. Subsidiary of Tianshui Huatian Technology (CMP-0068, China #3 OSAT). Founded 1989, HQ Ipoh, Malaysia. Wafer probing is a core test service.

_metadata.dataSource: Unisem IR, Bursa Malaysia, industry research
